title: system.health
description: Per-variant / system health events (e.g. tick-lag warnings, hardware errors) published by drs-bridge and drs-server. Envelope is { event, ...payload }: every message carries a string `event` type; the remaining payload fields vary by event type and stay OPEN until the data-plane spec fixes per-event payloads. drs-bridge per-instance events (B1.43) feed the Plan-2 /exercise/readiness connection-presence ('reachable') field: 'instance.connected' { instance_id }, 'instance.framing_mismatch' { instance_id, reason }, 'instance.failed_bind' { instance_id, reason }.
